transcript: I'd like to see the graveyard where Mama's buried and all the other people. I want you to come down. What if I could fly? I knew a man who could fly. Come down and I'll tell you all about him. Somebody go up there.

timestamps.text: I'd like to see the graveyard where Mama's buried and all the other people.
I want you to come down.
I knew a man who could fly.
Come down and I'll tell you all about him.
